metadata.auditScope: Verify location-independent listening rewards and map all XP/animation/sound triggers

locationIndependenceVerification.rule: Listening Time = Listening Points, not Location = Points

independentActions.verification: XpActionRegistry has no location check; trigger is time-based only
independentActions.surfaces: Any page with video player (Profile, Magazine, Home, Playlist, Radio)
independentActions.animationTrigger: XP +10 toast, tier progress bar glow

independentActions.verification: No location gate; time-based trigger, works in any live room or broadcast view
independentActions.surfaces: Any live broadcast (Home 3, Profile, Lobby, Live Room, Radio)

independentActions.verification: 30-min milestone; no location gate; works background tab, mobile app, etc.
independentActions.animationTrigger: Large milestone popup, tier meter jump, golden shine effect

independentActions.verification: Magazine, performer profile, home discovery all grant same XP; time-on-page based
independentActions.surfaces: Magazine, Profile Article, Discovery Rail, Newsletter
independentActions.animationTrigger: Article completion toast, reading streak counter

independentActions.verification: Entry-based, not view-duration-based; XP granted on successful lobby entry
independentActions.animationTrigger: Room-entered toast, audience count update with glow

independentActions.verification: Single check per 20-hour window; location irrelevant, just session auth
independentActions.surfaces: Awarded on app.tsx layout load with SessionContext
independentActions.animationTrigger: Daily streak badge, login counter animation

locationDependentActions.reason: Must physically submit battle entry on /battles/live or Arena page; can't grant from outside
Voting UI only appears in live room vote panel; not accessible elsewhere
Outcome determined by arena judge system; can only trigger during active battle

needsImplementationVerification.needsCheck: Verify XP granted consistently on all comment surfaces (article, performer, profile, chat)
Verify XP is actually granted on share action (not just button render)
Verify XP granted on like (check MediaPlayer.tsx + PlaylistPlayer.tsx)

triggers.animation: Toast slide-in with article icon, XP amount, reading streak counter
triggers.timing: Article completion (time-on-page threshold or manual completion)
triggers.vfx: Golden shine on streak badge, tier meter glow if milestone

triggers.animation: Small XP float-up from video player center
triggers.timing: Every stream start or natural break
triggers.vfx: Video player border glow (brief)

triggers.animation: Milestone toast with 5-minute badge icon, XP amount
triggers.vfx: Achievement unlock shine effect

triggers.animation: Large modal popup: 'MILESTONE: 30 Minutes!', tier progress bar jump, confetti alternative (XP only)
triggers.vfx: Screen-filling golden glow, tier meter overflow animation, badge unlock

triggers.animation: Room-join toast, audience count updates with glow, user avatar appears in seat
triggers.timing: On successful lobby entry (after avatar/seat assignment)
triggers.vfx: Audience count number +1 glow, user avatar entrance animation (fade-in or slide)

triggers.animation: Large success modal: booking confirmation + XP awarded + timeline update
triggers.timing: After booking form submission and Stripe success
triggers.vfx: Calendar/booking card appears in timeline with glow, XP counter jumps

triggers.animation: Comment appears in thread, small XP float-up from comment text
triggers.vfx: Comment fade-in from top, +5 XP badge

triggers.animation: Share confirmation toast: 'Shared! +20 XP'
triggers.timing: On share button click (social share complete)
triggers.vfx: Share icon highlight glow

triggers.animation: Same as share_article: 'Shared! +20 XP'
triggers.vfx: Share button glow, performer avatar briefly highlights

triggers.animation: Heart icon fills in, counter increments, small XP float-up
triggers.vfx: Heart pulse animation, like counter +1 animation

triggers.animation: Large tip success modal: amount confirmed, XP awarded (+100), performer gets notification
triggers.vfx: Tip counter animates up, user gets 'tipper' achievement badge glow, performer name highlights

triggers.animation: Purchase success + order confirmation, XP +150 modal, inventory updates
triggers.vfx: Merch item appears in inventory with golden border glow, tier meter jumps

triggers.animation: Ticket purchase confirmation, ticket code appears, XP +200
triggers.vfx: Ticket card appears in feed with glow, user's event calendar updates

triggers.animation: Large modal: 'Fan Club Member!', membership badge unlocked, XP +300, exclusive content hint
triggers.vfx: Member badge appears with star animation, loyalty tier updates, exclusive content icons appear

triggers.animation: License purchase confirmation, beat added to collection, XP +250
triggers.vfx: Beat tile appears in library with glow, license tag appears

triggers.animation: Large booking confirmation modal, venue details, XP +500, calendar updates
triggers.vfx: Venue appears on calendar with golden glow, performer's 'booked' badge updates, tier meter jumps significantly

triggers.animation: Battle entry confirmation, competitor list loads, XP +200
triggers.vfx: Battle bracket updates, user's name appears in competitor list with glow

triggers.animation: Victory modal with trophy icon, opponent name, audience size, XP +800, ranking update
triggers.vfx: Trophy animation (spin + glow), confetti or particles, leaderboard animates (user jumps ranks), tier meter significant jump

triggers.animation: Vote registered toast, vote counter updates on both competitors, small XP float
triggers.vfx: Vote button highlights, vote count on competitor cards animates up

triggers.animation: Cypher entry confirmation, rotation queue shows user position, XP +100
triggers.vfx: User joins rotation ring visualization, XP toast slides in

triggers.animation: Cypher winner announcement, trophy, audience applause, XP +500, leaderboard update
triggers.timing: When cypher round concludes with user as winner
triggers.vfx: Winner crown appears on user's avatar, trophy spin animation, cypher-champion badge unlocks

triggers.animation: Monthly Idol registration confirmation, bracket displayed, XP +300
triggers.vfx: User's name appears in tournament bracket, application confirms

triggers.animation: Top 3 placement announcement, medal (gold/silver/bronze), XP +2000, 'monthly-idol-finalist' achievement, profile badge update, leaderboard major jump
triggers.vfx: Medal on stage (3D if possible), confetti, leaderboard animates significantly, Profile shows finalist badge, tier meter jumps multiple levels

triggers.animation: Go Live confirmation, stream URL generated, XP +100, 'LIVE' badge appears on profile
triggers.vfx: LIVE badge pulses on profile, broadcast stream card appears with glow, XP toast

triggers.animation: Milestone modal: 'Reached 100 Viewers!', achievement badge, XP +500, viewer counter highlights
triggers.timing: When live audience reaches exactly 100 (or first time over 100)
triggers.vfx: Viewer count glows, milestone badge animates, user gets 'crowd-100' achievement

triggers.animation: Major milestone modal: 'Reached 500 Viewers!', trophy icon, XP +2000, leaderboard update, profile featured
triggers.vfx: Viewer counter pulses with golden glow, large notification banner, user gets 'crowd-500' achievement, profile gets featured badge

triggers.animation: Upload success, track added to profile/library, XP +150, 'track uploaded' notification
triggers.vfx: Track card appears in library with glow, upload counter increments

triggers.animation: Upload success, video processing, XP +200 (or awarded after transcoding), profile gallery updates
triggers.timing: After upload completes or transcoding finishes
triggers.vfx: Video tile appears in gallery with processing/ready state, upload counter

triggers.animation: Merch item added to store, item card appears, XP +100
triggers.vfx: Merch card appears in store with glow, inventory count updates

triggers.animation: Large modal: 'Sponsored Set Complete!', sponsor logo, XP +1000, 'sponsored-artist' achievement, revenue preview
triggers.vfx: Sponsor logo animation, achievement badge with sponsor branding, profile shows 'Sponsored' status, tier meter significant jump

triggers.animation: Daily login toast, streak counter updates, XP +20
triggers.timing: On app load if login > 20 hours ago
triggers.vfx: Login streak badge glows, counter increments with animation

triggers.animation: Profile completion celebration modal, XP +500, profile-complete badge, stats update
triggers.vfx: Completion badge unlocks with glow, profile section highlights

triggers.animation: Verification success modal, verified badge, XP +200, profile 'Verified' label appears
triggers.vfx: Verified checkmark animation, badge glows, profile header updates

triggers.animation: Referral success, new user joins, XP +300, referral counter updates, 'recruiter' badge progress
triggers.vfx: Referral card appears in feed with glow, recruiter badge counter increments

triggers.animation: Feature announcement modal, magazine cover preview, XP +1500, 'magazine-featured' badge, profile showcase update
triggers.timing: When article is featured in magazine
triggers.vfx: Magazine cover animates, featured badge glows, profile section highlights article

triggers.animation: Viral milestone modal, read count highlight, XP +2500, 'viral-article' achievement, profile featured
triggers.vfx: Read counter pulses with golden glow, viral badge with fire animation, leaderboard updates

notYetImplemented: Radio commercial break XP/audio/animation (Rule 25, not built)
Story sharing animation (story feature not built)
NFT-related XP actions (NFT system not confirmed active)
needsAudioRecording: Radio DJ voice talents (Julius, Record Ralph, Tiana, custom hosts)
Commercial break assets (sponsor audio integration templates)

verificationTodos: Confirm watch_stream XP triggered consistently across all video players (MediaPlayer.tsx, PlaylistPlayer.tsx, ProfileVideoGallery.tsx)
Confirm attend_live_room XP granted on UniversalLobbyEntry successful seat assignment
Confirm share_article XP granted (not just button render)
Confirm like_track XP granted across all playlist contexts
Verify cooldown enforcement (5 comment cooldown = 0.25 hours should block spam)
Test location independence: watch_live_5min in background tab (should not grant)
Test location independence: watch_stream in mini-player (should grant)
Verify all achievement unlock triggers (tipper, supporter, battle-winner, etc. badges appear)
Verify tier progression audio/animation triggers (meter fills + sound on level-up)
Test radio XP when built (if applicable to Rule 25 phase)
